validation_command: python -c "from pathlib import Path; b=Path('Hb Track - Backend/tests/training/invariants'); fs=[('test_inv_train_054_standalone_session.py','TestInvTrain054'),('test_inv_train_055_meso_overlap.py','TestInvTrain055'),('test_inv_train_056_micro_within_meso.py','TestInvTrain056'),('test_inv_train_057_session_within_microcycle.py','TestInvTrain057')]; missing=[fn for fn,cls in fs if not (b/fn).exists() or cls not in (b/fn).read_text(encoding='utf-8')]; assert not missing, 'FAIL: ausentes ou sem classe='+str(missing); [print('[OK] '+fn) for fn,_ in fs]; print('PASS AR_152: 4 arquivos de teste OK')"
